headline: Norfolk Southern to present at 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) President and CEO Mark George and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Jason Zampi will present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. Details on how to listen to the discussion are below.
